recommendations.title: Lost Bullet 2
recommendations.overview: Having cleared his name, genius mechanic Lino has only one goal in mind: getting revenge on the corrupt cops who killed his brother and his mentor.

recommendations.title: Gang Related
recommendations.overview: After murdering an undercover DEA agent, two corrupt cops scramble to cover up what they've done.

recommendations.title: The Prosecutor
recommendations.overview: A poor young man is wrongly charged with drug trafficking after being deceived. An ex-prosecutor investigates the case, uncovers a corrupt lawyer team's scheme, and restores justice despite obstruction from evil forces.

recommendations.title: Riki-Oh: The Story of Ricky
recommendations.overview: In 2001, where all correctional facilities have been privatized, martial artist Ricky finds himself victim to the corrupt system, found "guilty" of the manslaughter of an infamous crime boss.

recommendations.title: Robin Hood
recommendations.overview: A war-hardened Crusader and his Moorish commander mount an audacious revolt against the corrupt English crown.

recommendations.title: Collision
recommendations.overview: Over the course of one fateful day, a corrupt businessman and his socialite wife race to save their daughter from a notorious crime lord.

recommendations.title: Interview with a Hitman
recommendations.overview: An elite hitman returns to erase his past only to find that somebody has messed with his future.

recommendations.title: Fantomas vs. Scotland Yard
recommendations.overview: In the third and final episode of the trilogy, Fantômas imposes a head tax on the rich, threatening to kill those who do not comply.

recommendations.title: Hacker

recommendations.title: The Foreigner
